Sell Timing Recommendation

SELL @ September 2034

Based on historical major performance (excluding Katowice 2014), the optimal sell window for Budapest 2025 stickers is around 8-10 Years after release (~September 2034), when similar-age majors averaged +11957% ROI.

Reference majors at that age: Cluj-Napoca 2015, Columbus 2016, Cologne 2016, Atlanta 2017, Krakow 2017, Boston 2018, London 2018

Sell WindowTarget AgeAvg ROI at AgePortfolio EstimateReference MajorsSignal
